faq.title: Help Center & FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Arohan. Currently in prototype stage with clinical validation underway.

questions.q: What happens if there is a false positive (false alarm)?
questions.a: Arohan's AI engine is designed to minimize false positives by learning your baseline. If a false alarm occurs, you have a 30-second window to cancel the alert directly from the wearable or the app before emergency contacts are notified.

questions.q: What is a false negative, and how does Arohan address it?
questions.a: A false negative is when an event occurs but isn't detected. While no system is 100% accurate, we use high-frequency sampling of vitals and motion to maximize detection. We recommend keeping the device charged and snugly fitted for best results.
The Arohan platform is currently a prototype undergoing clinical validation. It is designed to assist and notify, but it should not replace professional medical devices or emergency services.

questions.q: How secure is my health data?
questions.a: We use end-to-end encryption (AES-256) for all data transmissions. Your health data is stored in secure AWS Mumbai region servers, compliant with global data privacy standards.

questions.q: Can I use Arohan with my existing watch?
questions.a: Yes, our plugin chip is designed to clip onto most standard watch straps and wristbands. We also offer dedicated bands for maximum comfort.

stillQuestions.title: Still have questions?
stillQuestions.desc: If you cannot find an answer in our FAQ, you can always contact us. We will answer you shortly!

faqs.question: What is the device pricing?
faqs.answer: We are currently in a prototype phase. Final pricing for the Arohan wearable device will be announced soon along with our official launch.

faqs.question: Can I return the device if it doesn't work for me?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, return the device in original condition for a full refund (shipping excluded).

faqs.question: Do I need a smartphone to use Arohan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a smartphone (iOS 15+ or Android 10+) is required for initial setup and to receive alerts. However, emergency contacts can be notified via SMS even if your phone is off.

faqs.question: Are there any hidden charges?
faqs.answer: No hidden fees! Device (one-time), Basic app (free), Premium (optional subscription). No activation fees, no cancellation fees.

faqs.question: What benefits do different plans offer?
faqs.answer: Our plans are designed to scale with your needs, from basic monitoring to advanced AI-driven health insights and priority family support. Detailed feature comparison will be available at launch.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for bulk orders?
faqs.answer: Yes! 10-49 units: 10% off, 50-99 units: 20% off, 100+ units: 30% off. Contact sales@arohanhealth.com for B2B quotes.

home.heroTitle: Arohan – AI-Powered Emergency Prevention & First Aid
home.heroSubtitle: A discreet wearable plugin chip and intelligent app designed to assist in health monitoring and emergency notification.
home.problemDesc: In health emergencies, every minute is vital. Many individuals live with limited immediate supervision, and family members may be distant. Early notification and clear guidance during those first few minutes can make a significant difference. Arohan aims to provide that critical connection between an event and the right assistance.
home.solution1Desc: Clips onto existing watches, rings and everyday wearables. Continuously tracks key vitals and motion linked to falls and acute events. Designed for all‑day and night comfort with low‑power operation.
home.solution2Desc: Learns each person's baseline to identify unusual patterns early, enabling prevention through timely intervention. Analyzes vitals and movement to detect potential health emergencies before they escalate. Triggers instant alerts to caregivers, family members or integrated emergency services.
home.solution3Desc: Voice‑ and chat‑based assistant designed for lay first responders. Provides clear, step‑by‑step instructions for common emergencies like chest pain, suspected stroke, severe bleeding or a fall with head injury. Built on curated, guideline‑aligned medical content vetted by doctors.
home.benefit2: Unobtrusive design that can be worn 24/7, even during sleep
home.benefit3: Instant alerts by phone call and SMS, wherever family members live
home.benefit4: Guided first aid so nearby helpers know exactly what to do until professionals take over
home.benefit5: Affordable enough to scale across families, senior‑living communities and hospitals
home.howItWorksDesc: Getting emergency help has never been simpler. Follow these 4 easy steps.
home.techDesc: Every second matters. We use technology to reach people faster, guide them better, and save lives more efficiently.
home.whoDesc: Tailored solutions for everyone in the ecosystem.
home.who1Desc: Independent living with 24/7 safety monitoring and peace of mind.
home.who2Desc: Real-time patient vitals and seamless API integration.
home.who3Desc: Employee wellness programs and health partnerships.

list.title: Limbus and Pupil Detector App
list.description: Developed an eye-tracking application that detects and tracks both the pupil center and the limbus (iris boundary) to estimate gaze direction with improved accuracy.

list.title: Portfolio Platform
list.description: Designed and developed a dynamic portfolio platform that allows users to create, manage, and showcase their professional profiles and projects.

list.title: genzi comic
list.description: An AI-powered comic generator that automatically creates comic scripts and visuals based on user-defined characters (actors) and story inputs. It uses Natural Language Processing to structure narratives with scene breakdowns, dialogues, and panel descriptions.

items.title: Limbus and Pupil Detector App
items.description: Developed an eye-tracking application that detects and tracks both the pupil center and the limbus (iris boundary) to estimate gaze direction with improved accuracy. The system uses computer vision techniques to process real-time video input, enabling robust eye movement tracking even under varying lighting conditions. By combining pupil and limbus detection, the application enhances precision and stability, making it suitable for use in assistive technologies, medical analysis, and human-computer interaction systems.

items.title: Portfolio Platform
items.description: Designed and developed a dynamic portfolio platform that allows users to create, manage, and showcase their professional profiles and projects in a structured and visually appealing manner. The platform supports customizable layouts, project uploads, and user-friendly navigation, helping individuals effectively present their skills and achievements online.

items.title: genzi comic
items.description: An AI-powered comic generator is a smart content creation tool that automatically generates comic scripts and visuals based on user-defined characters (actors) and story inputs. Using technologies like Natural Language Processing, it creates structured narratives with scene breakdowns, dialogues, and panel descriptions, and can integrate with image generation tools. This enables users to quickly turn ideas into engaging, story-driven comics with minimal effort.

howItWorksPage.title: How Arohan Works
howItWorksPage.subtitle: From setup to life-saving alerts in simple steps
howItWorksPage.journeyDesc: Follow these 5 steps to activate round-the-clock emergency monitoring

steps.label: Plug-in and Pair
steps.desc: Attach the Arohan plugin chip to a compatible watch, ring or wrist band. Pair it once with the mobile app to register the user, caregivers and emergency contacts.

steps.label: Learn Your Baseline
steps.desc: Over the first few days, Arohan's AI engine learns the user's typical heart-rate and motion patterns. This allows the system to detect meaningful deviations rather than reacting to every minor fluctuation.

steps.label: Continuous Monitoring
steps.desc: The device monitors vitals and movement round the clock. It looks for patterns that may indicate a fall, a rapid change in blood pressure or other warning signs of cardiac or neurological events.

steps.label: Instant Alerts
steps.desc: When an event is detected, Arohan automatically sends alerts through calls and SMS to registered contacts and, where integrated, partner ambulance or hospital services. Alerts can include time, location and last-known vital trends.

steps.label: Guided First Aid
steps.desc: The first responder on the scene opens the Arohan app or uses voice commands. The assistant asks a few basic questions (demographics etc), then provides structured, step-by-step guidance for first aid until professionals arrive.

howItWorksPage.fallDesc: AI analyzes accelerometer and gyroscope data 100 times per second, detecting sudden acceleration changes, impact force, and post-fall stillness.
howItWorksPage.cardiacDesc: Continuous ECG monitoring detects arrhythmia, tachycardia (fast heart rate), bradycardia (slow heart rate), and irregular patterns.
howItWorksPage.ctaDesc: Setup is quick. Protection lasts a lifetime.

firstAid.title: First Aid Guidance
firstAid.subtitle: Learn essential first aid techniques with step-by-step visual guides. Quick help while emergency services are on the way.
firstAid.emergencyNote: Emergency guidelines only. Call professional help immediately.

cpr.title: CPR (Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation)
steps: Call emergency services immediately
Place person on firm, flat surface
Place heel of hand on center of chest
Push hard and fast - 100-120 compressions per minute
Allow chest to return to normal position after each compression

choking.title: Choking Emergency
steps: Encourage coughing if person can breathe
Give 5 back blows between shoulder blades
Perform 5 abdominal thrusts (Heimlich maneuver)
Repeat until object is dislodged
Call emergency services if unsuccessful

bleeding.title: Severe Bleeding
steps: Apply direct pressure with clean cloth
Keep pressure continuous for 10-15 minutes
Elevate injured area above heart if possible
Don't remove cloth if blood soaks through - add more layers
Seek immediate medical attention

burns.title: Burns Treatment
steps: Remove from heat source immediately
Cool burn with running water for 10-20 minutes
Remove jewelry/tight clothing before swelling
Cover with sterile, non-stick bandage
Never apply ice, butter, or ointments

symptomChecker.title: AI Symptom Checker (Beta)
symptomChecker.description: Describe your symptoms below. Our AI model will assess urgency.
symptomChecker.label: Describe your symptoms (e.g., severe chest pain)

results.moreDetails: Info: Please provide more details about your symptoms for an accurate assessment.
results.greeting: Info: Hello! I am the AI Symptom Checker. Please describe your symptoms (e.g., "severe headache", "chest pain").
results.cardiac: CRITICAL: Potential cardiac or respiratory event. Recommendation: CALL SOS IMMEDIATELY.
results.neuro: WARNING: Potential neurological issue. Recommendation: Consult a physician.
results.unknown: Notice: Unable to assess urgency based on description. If you are in pain or concerned, please visit the nearest clinic.
